title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 409.836 - General authority of commissioner
text:
409.836.  General authority of commissioner. — In addition to specific authority granted elsewhere in sections 409.800 to 409.863, the commissioner may make, amend, and rescind rules, forms, and orders as are necessary to carry out the provisions of* sections 409.800 to 409.863.
(L. 1985 H.B. 409 & 532 § 15) 
*Word "of" does not appear in original rolls; omitted by typographical error.
